# Project Templates & Showcase Sites

_Applies when: bootstrapping a new full-stack TS project or building a content/showcase site._

## New projects start from the Claude-Template

- Bootstrap every new project from the Claude-Template monorepo, not from scratch:
  Turborepo + pnpm workspaces, `apps/{web,api,mobile}` + `packages/{shared-types,shared-ui,shared-api,config}`,
  FSD with ESLint boundary enforcement, Vitest, Husky + commitlint, the standard VS Code plugin set.
- Canonical stack to reuse (question any new tech against it): Supabase (DB/auth/storage),
  Cloudflare Pages (hosting), Vite + React 19 + TanStack Router/Query, Hono + Prisma (API),
  React Native + Expo (mobile), Zod shared-types as SSOT, ESLint (FSD) + Prettier.

## Content / showcase sites: the Supabase + Cloudflare pattern

- Source content as Markdown in the repo → a seeder (`tooling/seed-supabase`) parses frontmatter +
  body and upserts into Supabase → the SPA reads at runtime via the anon key with RLS read-only.
- Tables carry `*_de` / `*_en` columns for i18n; queries select `field:field_{lang}` dynamically.
- Service-role key is seeder-only (bypasses RLS); the public app never writes.
- Tailwind v4 CSS-first theming, no-FOUC theme/lang script, deploy to Cloudflare Pages
  (SPA routing via `_redirects`).
